title: 第1節　薄明の玄関
continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same apartment-departure incident as scene-001-001-001-sato.
Keep the same dawn apartment environment and same entry area as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background figure leaving home and must not look toward Sera or the attacker.
prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第1章　朝の河畔 / 第1話　走る支度. Scene focus: 第1節　薄明の玄関 / セラパート. Summary: そのころ、マンションの共用廊下の外れでは、宅配業者を装った男が防災盤の脇へ薄い発煙器具を差し込んでいた。煙そのものは小規模でいい。非常ベルと人の足を一瞬だけ乱し、玄関から出てき… Key beats: そのころ、マンションの共用廊下の外れでは、宅配業者を装った男が防災盤の脇へ薄い発煙器具を差し込んでいた。煙そのものは小規模でいい。非常ベルと人の足を一瞬だけ乱し、玄関から出てきた標的の歩調を崩すのが目的だ。朝の住宅街に紛れる工作としては、いかにも趣味が悪い。 セラは外階段の影で、その手元を無言で見ていた。銀灰色の髪は低くまとめ、黒白の可愛らしいメイド風ジョギングウェアの上から軽いジャケットを羽織っている。プリーツ入りのランニングスカートの下には機能性レギンス、耳元には猫耳カチューシャ（警護支援ユニット）。一般人には少し凝ったランニングアクセサリにしか見えないが、彼女にとっては視界と距離感を研ぎ澄ますための実用品だった。 「玄関を出る前から空気を悪くしないでください」 男が姿勢を起こすより早く、セラは外階段を二段飛ばしで下りた。細いワイヤーが手首へ巻きつき、器具だけが抜かれる。もう片方の手で男の肘をひねり、防災盤へ額をぶつけない角度で膝裏を払う。男は声を上げる間もなく崩れ、宅配ケースにもたれかかったまま意識を落とした。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-part of the same apartment-departure incident as scene-001-001-001-sato. Keep the same dawn apartment environment and same entry area as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background figure leaving home and must not look toward Sera or the attacker. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a covert apartment-entry action image with Sera dominant in her maid-inspired jogging outfit, silently disabling a building infiltrator near service panels or parcel lockers. Keep Sato smaller in the background, just heading out for his run and unaware.
